steps.title: Identify the defining goal
steps.content: The student needs to find one specific piece of information: the combined carrying capacity of Belgium's merchant ships in 2021.

steps.title: Match the answer to the goal
steps.content: Choice C directly states this capacity: 9.6 million tons in 2021. The others give only ship counts or definitions, not the combined capacity needed. This matches choice C — C is correct.
